title: sodiumfpscapfix
description: Replaces Sodium's FPS cap slider with a textbox so you can set any custom FPS cap.
body:
Sodium FPS Cap Fix is a small client-side addon for Sodium that replaces the max framerate slider with a text box, letting you type in any FPS cap you want.

It also removes the vanilla 260 FPS ceiling, so values above the normal slider range actually work instead of getting treated as uncapped.

Features:
- Replaces the FPS cap slider with a text box
- Lets you enter any custom FPS cap
- Saves your chosen value
- Works as a lightweight Sodium addon

Requires Sodium.

Supported versions:
- Fabric 1.20.1
- Fabric 1.21.1
- Fabric 1.21.11
- Fabric 26.1.2
- NeoForge 1.21.1
- NeoForge 1.21.11
- NeoForge 26.1.2
